privileged_info_summary: The hardware_datasheet_create task requires users to create an Apache OpenOffice Writer document with specific technical specifications for an SE-9042 Low-Power IoT Transceiver. All product data is synthetically generated within setup_task.sh and includes: product name SE-9042, title Low-Power IoT Transceiver, status Preliminary, sensitivity specification -148 dBm, RX current 4.6 mA, and data rate 0.1 kbps. The task requires a 2-column layout for the main body content, insertion of an Electrical Characteristics table, and a footer containing 'SiliconEdge Solutions - Confidential'. The output file is saved as SE9042_Datasheet.odt.
